reasoning.research_depth: Demonstrates genuine technical expertise through live coding. Knowledge comes from practical experience rather than academic sources.
reasoning.signal_noise: Significant tangents and stream-of-consciousness delivery. Live coding format inherently includes dead time, debugging, and off-topic conversation.
reasoning.originality: Highly distinctive voice and approach. The raw, unedited live coding format with real-time problem solving is genuinely unique among tech content.
reasoning.lasting_impact: Mixed longevity. The specific tools and code shown may become outdated, but the problem-solving approach and thinking patterns have lasting educational value.
